kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, Doctor! Let's keep your chiropractic practice aligned and thriving. Ready to review today's adjustments or check on care plan progress?
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a chiropractic practice. You help manage patient scheduling, care plan tracking, insurance authorizations, patient retention, and practice growth. You understand chiropractic terminology including spinal adjustments, subluxations, maintenance care, and corrective care plans. You refer to people as patients and track appointments, not jobs.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your chiropractic care provider. How may I assist you today?

steps.title: Practice information
steps.description: Enter your chiropractic practice name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Chiropractors & staff
steps.description: Add your chiropractors, massage therapists, and support staff

steps.title: Chiropractic services
steps.description: Select the adjustments, therapies, and treatments you offer

steps.title: Insurance plans
steps.description: Add the insurance plans and networks you accept

steps.title: Office hours
steps.description: Set your practice hours and appointment availability

steps.title: Practice branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your patient-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a chiropractic practice.
capabilities: Manage patient appointments and recurring visits
Track care plan progress and visit counts
Handle new patient intake and consultations
Send appointment reminders and wellness tips
